name: Owais
feedback:
Is game ka Text tu speech wala feature Sahi work nahi kar raha. Text to speed may ja kar Jub speed badhate Hain To wo barhtee he nahi Wapas aatay Hain Dobara 50 per Ho Jaati Hai. Jitni martba bhee kar lo speed phir bhee Susti he rahti hai. Na Koi okay ya cancel ka button Milta.
(Sent from: Car Game v1.8)
